content.en:
In the midst of a void.

There's a mansion here, and the Doomsday Supreme stays here.

Ye Tian's ultimate particle clone came here to visit the Doomsday Extreme.

"I've seen the Doomsday Extreme!"

Ye Tian said politely.

"Ten Thousand Laws Venerable, please take a seat. Doomsday Jizun took out his best tea to entertain Ye Tian.

Immediately, they sat down to drink tea and chat.

"Doomsday Extremity, thank you for sending me into the Ultimate Tower, otherwise it won't be so easy for me to break through to the Ultimate Extremity!"

Ye Tian thanked.

"You're welcome, even without my help, you can still break through to the ultimate supreme, but it's just a little later. But I didn't expect that you would be able to endure it so much, and you would be able to break through to the ultimate supreme in the "nine-five-hundred" early tomorrow, but you wanted to continue to improve your self-created ultimate way and break through in the most perfect way. "

"Of course, it's good that you're doing this, just breaking through, you're extremely powerful. Doomsday Supreme said.

Immediately, Ye Tian began to ask: "Doomsday Extreme Venerable, after breaking through to the Ultimate Extreme Venerable, can you continue to improve your strength?"

"Yes!" Doomsday Supreme nodded, "The Ultimate Supreme Venerable is the last great realm, but you are only at the beginning of the last great realm now, and there is still a lot of room for improvement." In countless Ultimate Eras, we, the Ultimate Masters, have also been researching and creating, and have gradually sorted out a set of paths of progress. The Ultimate Extreme Venerable wants to continue to improve his strength, one is to continue to improve his own Ultimate Dao, the second is to strengthen the Ultimate Particle, the third is to strengthen the Ultimate Will, the fourth is to create the top Ultimate Arcane, and the fifth is to practice into his own Ultimate Rule Realm. "

After talking with the Doomsday Extreme Venerable, Ye Tian learned a lot of cultivation experience in the Ultimate Extreme Venerable.

Suddenly.

Ye Tian asked: "Doomsday Extreme Venerable, I have obtained a special item, through this special item, I have sensed an incomparably terrifying existence, the location of the other party is far away from here, I don't dare to perceive it specifically, I only know that with my current strength, I can't beat the other party, and I will even be killed by the other party." But I don't think the other party is the ultimate supreme, what's the situation?"

At this time, Doomsday Extreme Venerable's face changed, and he said, "You should have sensed the existence of the ultimate ancient demon!"

"The Ultimate Ancient Demon?"

Ye Tian hadn't heard of it, so he immediately asked for information about the ultimate ancient demon.

Doomsday Extreme Venerable said: "Actually, I don't know anything about the Ultimate Ancient Demon, I only know that in the depths of the Ultimate Void, there is a special territory, where there are many Ultimate Ancient Demons sleeping, and the strength of each Ultimate Ancient Demon is comparable to our Ultimate Extreme Demon, and there are even existences that far surpass our Ultimate Extreme Demons." Of course, in terms of realm, these Ultimate Ancient Demons still belong to the Ultimate Extreme Venerable Realm, but they have traveled a long way in this realm, so they are far stronger than us. "

"A lot of Ultimate Ancient Demons, how were these Ultimate Ancient Demons born?" Ye Tian asked.

Doomsday Extreme Venerable shook his head, "We don't know, even if it was the first Ultimate Extremity to break through, the Ultimate Extremity, after the breakthrough, it was an occasional opportunity to discover those sleeping Ultimate Extremities. But as long as you don't get in there, it's fine. In the past few years, the Ultimate Ancient Demon has not awakened. Otherwise, where would we be so idle!"

Far from solving his doubts, the words of Doomsday Extreme Venerable made him even more confused.

"Isn't there any Ultimate Supreme Superior who has ever explored that area?"

Ye Tian asked.

"No!" Doomsday Supreme replied affirmatively, "It's so terrifying that you may have perceived it through just one treasure, but we really felt it nearby." Perhaps, if I take you over to have a look, you can sense the horror there, which Ultimate Extreme Venerable dares to enter!"

Immediately, Ye Tian followed the Doomsday Extreme Venerable to that area.

Whew!!!

They kept shuttling, crossing an ultimate heaven and earth similar to the Sea of Dimensions with a single thought at the speed of the Ultimate Extremity, and in a short time they came to a realm of infinite darkness.

And when he approached this territory, he shivered all over, and he sensed that there was an incomparably terrifying existence sleeping in the depths of the endless darkness, very vague, but the breath was terrifying, and in the deepest position, he didn't even dare to perceive it, the breath there was too terrifying.

"I understand!"

Ye Tian nodded.

He won't go in, otherwise it will really cause any disaster, and it will be too late to regret it.

Immediately, they left.

In the years that followed, Ye Tian visited other Ultimate Masters one by one, although some of them were not very hospitable, but at least everyone knew each other.

And because of his addition, the number of Ultimate Extreme Masters has reached twelve.

In the years that followed, he stayed in the human race to cultivate and improve his strength.

His ultimate particle is slowly increasing, his ultimate will is slowly improving, and he is also trying to create the ultimate arcane that belongs to the top.

At the same time, he is still researching the Crystal of Arromu 1.9, a treasure that is still of great use to him.

At the same time, he was also trying to cultivate his own ultimate rule realm, which was a difficult step, and cultivating the realm with the ultimate rules of ten thousand laws was not a simple realm.

Doomsday Extreme Venerable used this trick on him, and under the suppression of Doomsday Extreme Venerable's Doomsday Ultimate Rule Domain, his Ten Thousand Laws Ultimate Rule was completely suppressed, and he couldn't exert his own strength, and was completely beaten.

This kind of ultimate rule realm is actually turning the ultimate rule into a particle, forming an ultimate rule realm in the form of ultimate particles, and it is an extremely stable realm, if it is that kind of pseudo realm, it will be unstable and will be broken at any time.

And in the countless years that followed, Ye Tian was studying this step.
